---
title: "Setting Up a Payment Gateway"
sidebarTitle: "Payment Gateway Setup"
description: "How to create and configure a Stripe payment gateway for a hub on Vivenu, including webhook configuration."
---

## Creating a New Payment Gateway

<Steps>
  <Step title="Open Payment Gateways">
    Under **Settings > Payments > Payment Gateways**, click **Create**.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Select Stripe and name the gateway">
    Select **Stripe** as the payment provider and name the gateway `Hub # Stripe`, replacing `#` with the hub number.

    Click **Create**. You should now see the new payment gateway listed as inactive.

    ![The new payment gateway shown as inactive in the list](/images/software/vivenu/vivenu-payment-inactive.png)
  </Step>
</Steps>

---

## Configuring the Payment Gateway

<Steps>
  <Step title="Open the gateway editor">
    Click **Edit** on the inactive gateway to open the details sidebar.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Enable channels">
    Under **Channel**, enable all three options: **Online**, **POS**, and **Recurring Payments**.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Set the statement descriptor">
    Under **Statement Descriptor**, enter `FAT Karting League`.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Enable Klarna">
    Enable **Klarna** as a payment method.
  </Step>
</Steps>

---

## Connecting with Stripe

<Steps>
  <Step title="Initiate the Stripe connection">
    Click **Connect with Stripe** to be taken to the Stripe configuration page.

    ![The Connect with Stripe button on the payment gateway page](/images/software/vivenu/connect-stripe.png)
  </Step>
  <Step title="Select the correct Stripe account">
    Select the Stripe account relevant to the hub you are setting up and connect.

    <Warning>
      If you are unsure which Stripe account is correct for this hub, contact the finance team before proceeding.
    </Warning>
  </Step>
  <Step title="Authenticate and return to Vivenu">
    You will be redirected to Vivenu for authentication. Once confirmed, you will be returned to **Settings > Information**.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Verify the connection">
    Navigate back to the payment gateway. The Stripe account should now show as connected.

    ![The payment gateway showing the Stripe account connected](/images/software/vivenu/vivenu-stripe-connected.png)
  </Step>
</Steps>

---

## Setting Up Webhooks

<Note>
  The webhook instructions shown within Vivenu may be out of date. Follow this SOP rather than the guidance provided in the platform.
</Note>

<Steps>
  <Step title="Open the Stripe Webhooks dashboard">
    Navigate to [https://dashboard.stripe.com/webhooks](https://dashboard.stripe.com/webhooks).
  </Step>
  <Step title="Copy the webhook URL from Vivenu">
    Copy the webhook URL from Vivenu.

    ![Copying the webhook URL from Vivenu](/images/software/vivenu/vivenu-copy-url.png)
  </Step>
  <Step title="Select events">
    Under **Configure your event destination > Events**, select **Select all** and continue.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Select destination type">
    Select **Webhook endpoint** and continue.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Acknowledge payload styles">
    You will see a note about payload styles. Continue through.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Configure the destination">
    Set the destination name to `Vivenu Hub # Seller`, replacing `#` with the hub number.

    Paste the URL copied from Vivenu into **Endpoint URL**.

    Enter the following into **Description**:

    ```
    This is the endpoint to send all stripe events to Vivenu whenever transactions occur
    ```

    Continue to proceed.

    ![The Stripe webhook payload configuration screen](/images/software/vivenu/stripe-webhook-payload.png)
  </Step>
  <Step title="Copy the signing secret">
    Copy the **Signing Secret** for the **Snapshot** payload style and paste it into the **Webhook Signing Secret** field on Vivenu.

    ![Pasting the signing secret into Vivenu](/images/software/vivenu/vivenu-secret-signing.png)
  </Step>
  <Step title="Validate and save on Vivenu">
    Click **Validate & Save** to complete the Vivenu configuration.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Finish on Stripe">
    Return to Stripe, review the details, and click **Done** if everything looks correct.

    ![Reviewing and completing the Stripe webhook setup](/images/software/vivenu/stripe-webhook-secret.png)
  </Step>
</Steps>
